note: Genesis = the pre-quorum baseline registry (its keys predate the x2F3B quorum-gate, so they are trusted as-is, not proven). From here forward, every registry change must append a 3-of-5 quorum-authorized amendment below, and the live x2F38 must fold from this chain (t registry-amend integrity). A direct out-of-band edit of x2F38 breaks the fold and reds CI. Anchoring genesis_hash to Bitcoin is future work for external tamper-evidence.

genesis.custody_note: Public keys only. Private keys live outside the repo (~/.trinity/keys). Adding/rotating an entry is a custody ceremony: architect mints via `voice-keys keygen` and commits the entry with a decision chord.
